commands.review_summary:
The PR adds Slack live QA approval scenarios, a Mantis Slack desktop `--approval-checkpoints` mode with pending/resolved screenshot artifacts, docs, and carries already-landed Slack native plugin approval support.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a bug reproduction: this PR adds a new QA/Mantis checkpoint mode. The changed behavior still lacks high-confidence live proof because only focused tests are reported.
commands.review_followup: Needs maintainer/contributor handling for rebase and real Slack/Mantis proof; there is no narrow automated code repair to queue from this review.

target.title: Add Slack approval QA checkpoints
target.body:
## Summary
- Add Slack live QA scenarios for native exec and plugin approval prompts, resolved updates, and approval artifact reporting.
- Add Mantis Slack desktop `--approval-checkpoints` mode with pending/resolved screenshot handshakes and artifact validation.
- Document Slack approval QA scenarios and Mantis checkpoint usage.

## Verification
- `git diff --check`
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check extensions/qa-lab/src/live-transports/slack/slack-live.runtime.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/live-transports/slack/slack-live.runtime.test.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/mantis/cli.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/mantis/cli.runtime.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/mantis/slack-desktop-smoke.runtime.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/mantis/slack-desktop-smoke.runtime.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/qa-lab/src/live-transports/slack/slack-live.runtime.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/qa-lab/src/mantis/slack-desktop-smoke.runtime.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/qa-lab/src/cli.test.ts`
- `pnpm docs:list | rg -i "qa|mantis|slack"`
- `python3 /Users/kevinlin/.codex/skills/specy/scripts/validate_flow_doc.py --kind flow-doc --doc /Users/kevinlin/code/openclaw/.mem/main/flows/slack-approval-qa-checkpoints.md`

## Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: Slack QA can now deterministically request native exec and plugin approvals, assert Slack Block Kit approval actions, resolve the approval, and verify the resolved Slack update. Mantis can capture pending and resolved Slack Web screenshots through approval checkpoint files.
Real environment tested: Local Codex worktree with focused runtime/unit coverage for Slack QA, Mantis Slack desktop command generation/artifact validation, and qa-lab CLI routing.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: The verification commands listed above were run after the patch.
Evidence after fix: Slack runtime test passed 13 tests; Mantis Slack desktop runtime test passed 13 tests; qa-lab CLI test passed 25 tests; formatting, diff, docs-list, and flow-doc validation passed.
Observed result after fix: Approval scenario selection, redaction, checkpoint command generation, watcher race handling, checkpoint metadata validation, and CLI flag routing all pass their focused tests.
What was not tested: A live Slack/Mantis run against real Slack credentials was not run from this local worktree.
target.author: kevinslin

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
